one_law: Generated artifacts are either deploy-critical tracked snapshots or ignored runtime receipts; they must not appear as surprise dirty work in unrelated lanes.

tracked_snapshots.reason: Canonical generated Brain knowledge bundle snapshot.
Brain knowledge database snapshot used by local tooling.
Auditable crawl mirror for public Brain knowledge.
Committed static deploy output per repository .gitignore policy.

ignored_runtime_outputs.reason: Pre-agent status report; changes every run.
Pre-agent lane receipt; changes every run.
Founder intent approval receipt; runtime proof.

commit_policy: Generated Brain corpus may be committed only as its own lane commit.
Runtime reports and receipts must stay outside the repo or ignored.
Dist assets may be committed only with their matching source asset lane.
Agents must not mix generated snapshots with runtime code unless the founder explicitly asks for a multi-lane package.
